Petition, 1. To Remove Trustee For Breach Of Trust And Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Appoint A Successor Trustee; 2. For Fraudulent Concersion.. Et Al.
Off Calendar May-24-2017 Continued To Jul-19-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mary Mayo for Deanna De Leon (Petitioner).

Ms. Mayo stated that they are at a point where it would be beneficial to have a Court order for mediation to have the entire family get together. The Court informed Counsel that the matter does not qualify for pro bono mediation and stated that it can not order other parties to participate in meditation. Mr. Louie stated that they have been talking about many things, that they have had vigorous discussions and that they are making progress. The Petition to Remove Trustee for Breach of Trust, etc. is continued to July 19, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the parties to complete mediation. The parties are to report as to status of mediation by July 12, 2017. If the matter is not resolved, the parties are to meet and confer as to how to proceed. If Counsel want both of their Clients to participate in mediation, the Court can issue an order as to those parties only.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition, 1. To Remove Trustee For Breach Of Trust And Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Appoint A Successor Trustee; 2. For Fraudulent Concersion.. Et Al.
Off Calendar May-10-2017 Continued To May-24-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition, 1. To Remove Trustee For Breach Of Trust And Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Appoint A Successor Trustee; 2. For Fraudulent Concersion.. Et Al.
Off Calendar Apr-26-2017 Continued To May-10-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Terrence Mayo for Petitioner.
Jason Louie for Rowena Jen (Respondent).

Mr. Mayo stated that they are pursuing a private sale that may or may not happen, and asked for two weeks stating that either the property will sell or it will be listed by then. Mr. Louie stated that he agreed to the two weeks to accommodate Counsel. The Petition to Remove Trustee for Breach of Trust, etc. is continued to May 10, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition, 1. To Remove Trustee For Breach Of Trust And Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Appoint A Successor Trustee; 2. For Fraudulent Concersion.. Et Al.
Off Calendar Mar-15-2017 Continued To Apr-26-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mary Mayo for and with Deanna De Leon (Petitioner).
Jason Louie for and with Rowena Jen (Trustee).
Irene Wong (Beneficiary) also present.

Ms. Mayo stated that she received a response late yesterday, that Mr. Louie will provide information by April 4, 2017, that they will meet at her office on April 11, 2017 and requested a return date in the third or fourth week of April. The Petition to Remove Trustee for Breach of Trust, etc. is continued to April 26, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
